languages.text:
The user gains +1 stack of {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}antigrav charge{/g} for each cell they move.
When the number of stacks on the user becomes {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, they lose all of them and gain +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
The user cannot suffer the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента получает +1 уровень {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}гравитационного заряда{/g} за каждую клетку, на которую перемещается.
Когда количество уровней достигает {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, они все снимаются, и обладатель аугмента получает +1 уровень {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.
Обладатель аугмента не может получить {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалеченную ногу{/g}.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer erhält für jedes passierte Feld +1 Stapel {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}Antigravitationsladung{/g}.
Erreicht die Zahl der Stapel {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, verliert er sie alle und erhält +1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}.
Der Nutzer kann nicht mit dem Effekt {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}verkrüppeltes Bein{/g} belegt werden.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur gagne +1 cumul de {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}Charge antigrav{/g} pour chaque case qu'il traverse.
Arrivé à {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, il les consomme tous et obtient +1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.
Il ne peut pas souffrir de {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Jambe mutilée{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user gains +1 stack of {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}antigrav charge{/g} for each cell they move.

The user cannot suffer the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur gagne +1 cumul de {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}Charge antigrav{/g} pour chaque case qu'il traverse.
Arrivé à {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, il les consomme tous et obtient +1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.
Il ne peut pas souffrir de {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Jambe mutilée{/g}.

languages.text:
使用者每移动1格，就会获得1层{g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}反重力电荷{/g}。
使用者拥有{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}层该效果后，失去所有此效果层数并获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。
使用者免疫{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}腿骨骨折{/g}效果。
languages.original_text:
The user gains +1 stack of {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}antigrav charge{/g} for each cell they move.
When the number of stacks on the user becomes {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, they lose all of them and gain +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
The user cannot suffer the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text:
使用者每移动1格，就会获得1层{g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}反重力电荷{/g}。
使用者拥有{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}层该效果后，失去所有此效果层数并获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。
使用者免疫{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}腿骨骨折{/g}效果。

languages.text:
El usuario recibe +1 acumulación de {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}carga antigravitatoria{/g} por cada casilla recorrida.
Cuando el usuario llegue a {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} acumulaciones, las pierde todas y gana +1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.
El usuario no puede sufrir el efecto {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}pierna lisiada{/g}.
languages.original_text:

traits.locale_text:

Cuando el usuario llegue a {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} acumulaciones, las pierde todas y gana +1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.
El usuario no puede sufrir el efecto {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}pierna lisiada{/g}.

languages.text:
使用者は移動する各セルにつき、+1スタックの{g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}アンチグラブ・チャージ{/g} を得る。
使用者のスタック数が{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} になったとき、使用者はそれらをすべて失い、+{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}ポテンシャルエネルギー{/g} を得る。
使用者は{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}不自由な足{/g} の効果を受けない。
languages.original_text:
The user gains +1 stack of {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}antigrav charge{/g} for each cell they move.
When the number of stacks on the user becomes {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus}, they lose all of them and gain +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
The user cannot suffer the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, geçtiği her hücre için +1 {g|f:3a3202273a334a989eee9d85b2df93f0}çekim kesen güç yükü{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Kullanıcı, üzerindeki birikimi sayısı {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} olduğunda hepsini kaybeder ve +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Kullanıcı, {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}kötürüm bacak{/g} etkisine maruz kalamaz.
